name: Sparkline
description: Pure SVG polyline sparkline for broker-status stat tiles; stroke is currentColor so the parent controls color via a text token.

props.name: points
props.description: {t, v}[] time-series samples. Fewer than 2 points renders nothing; a zero value range renders a midline.

props.name: height
props.description: Rendered height in px; width stretches to the container.

notes: No color tokens consumed directly by design — stroke follows currentColor, parent sets e.g. text-primary. No external chart lib.
